text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In preparation for the Shuka Sho, Sweep Tosho
proposes a more rigorous training schedule than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see in her eyes a fierce determination to win first
place. Respecting that drive, I decide to spend
the next two weeks immersed in training with her.
